initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT SUM(Match.home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON (
    Match.home_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X9 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.home_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
)
WHERE Player.player_name = 'Aaron Lennon';
